description: Perform a comparative inhalation risk assessment for Methanol, Toluene, Acetone, Carbon Disulfide, and Ethylene Oxide using data from CAMEO Chemicals (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/). For each chemical, determine the IDLH (ppm) and Vapor Pressure (mmHg) to calculate the Inhalation Risk Ratio (Vapor Pressure / IDLH). Export the results to /home/ga/Documents/inhalation_risk_assessment.csv with the header 'Chemical,CAS,IDLH_ppm,Vapor_Pressure_mmHg,VP_IDLH_Ratio,Risk_Rank'. The data must be sorted by Risk_Rank from 1 (highest ratio) to 5 (lowest ratio), with the VP_IDLH_Ratio rounded to three decimal places.
